name: x402-error-payment-invalid
description: Golden fixture for HTTP 422 X402_PAYMENT_INVALID with subcause=signature_invalid (the most common x402 failure: agent's signed authorization does not match the recovered ECDSA signer).
scenario: agent signs with wrong key; facilitator /verify rejects; Hub does NOT call /settle

headers.X-Payment: <base64 encoded x402 envelope, signature does NOT recover to `from`>

error.message: X-Payment signature is invalid: signer 0xabc... does not match `from` 0xdef...

postconditions: x402_settlements has NO row for this request_id
facilitator received exactly one /verify call; ZERO /settle calls
Hub audit_log records the rejection with target='x402.payment_rejected'
